sql_array: CREATE TABLE h3_data (resolution UInt8, numHexagons Int64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY resolution;
UPDATE h3_data SET numHexagons = h3NumHexagons(2) WHERE resolution = 1;
SELECT resolution, h3NumHexagons(resolution) AS numHexagons FROM h3_data;
INSERT INTO h3_data SELECT resolution, h3NumHexagons(resolution) FROM numbers(16);
